//: file location: desktop/package.json — Electron shell for the H&P System DMS. This package is intentionally isolated from the root Next.js package.json so the web app remains untouched.
//TODO:branding: Replace assets/logo.png with a square 512x512 PNG, and ideally drop a multi-resolution build/icon.ico for crisp 16/32/48/256px taskbar/installer icons. electron-builder picks build/icon.ico up automatically. Needs design assets supplied — cannot be generated from inside this repo.
//TODO:codesign: No Windows code-signing certificate is configured. Without one, users see SmartScreen 'Windows protected your PC' warnings on first install. To enable: buy an EV/OV cert (DigiCert, Sectigo, SSL.com), then add 'certificateFile' and 'certificatePassword' (via env var) under build.win. Requires purchased credentials — cannot be done from inside this repo.
name: hnpsystem-desktop
description: H&P System desktop shell — wraps the hosted Humphries & Parks DMS in a dedicated Windows application window.

scripts.//dev: Run Electron pointing at the local Next.js dev server. Override DMS_APP_URL to target a deployed URL instead.
scripts.//start: Run the desktop shell against the configured production DMS URL (DMS_APP_URL env or the fallback in src/config.js).
scripts.//build:win: Build a Windows .exe installer (NSIS) into desktop/dist. No code signing — see README for cert setup.
scripts.//build:win:portable: Optional portable build (no installer) for ad-hoc engineer use.
scripts.//clean: Wipe build output without removing node_modules.
